case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. RAYMOND WEI PENG

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-19-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61769183) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, RAYMOND WEI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-30-2017
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100027391) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100031008), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SERVED DEC-09-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, RAYMOND WEI
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENG, RAYMOND WEI $11,683.57 PRINCIPAL, $551.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,235.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61769183)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $551.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 61769183) AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, RAYMOND WEI
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100038299): MUKAI, JEFFERY SUBSTITUTED FOR WINN, BRIAN N AS ATTORNEY FOR WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-19-2017 CONTINUED TO MAY-15-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-19-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE: UNDERLYING ACTION OF ACCOUNT STATED (TRANSACTION ID # 61769183) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 61769183) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
PLAINTIFFS AFFIDAVIT OF MILITARY STATUS IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61769183) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-15-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
